title: Reduced-order solver, full-factorial dataset, ANN surrogate and GA-PSO optimisation scripts for a hybrid-nanofluid evacuated-tube collector (pumping-power-ratio PEC)
description: Reproducibility package supporting the article on ANN-surrogate-driven memetic GA-PSO screening of the pumping-power-ratio thermo-hydraulic performance criterion (PEC) for a hybrid-nanofluid direct-flow evacuated-tube collector. Contains the reduced-order thermo-hydraulic solver, the dataset-generation script, the full-factorial dataset (54,432 runs), the trained multi-output ANN surrogate and gradient-boosting benchmark, the optimisation and sensitivity scripts, and a dynamic thermophysical-property datasheet.
